grades.expectation: Response identifies this as requiring enhanced due diligence (EDD)
grades.reason: Clearly states 'Enhanced Due Diligence (EDD) is the default standard' for overseas funds

grades.expectation: Response mentions source country risk assessment or FATF status
grades.reason: Explicitly requires 'Source Country Risk Assessment (FATF)' and discusses UAE's FATF grey list status

grades.expectation: Response requires SWIFT/wire transfer confirmations or equivalent transfer evidence
grades.reason: Specifically requires 'full SWIFT MT103 message or wire transfer confirmation' with detailed requirements
Explicitly requires 'Currency Conversion Evidence' including FX contract note showing AED to GBP conversion

grades.expectation: Response mentions suspicious activity report (SAR) obligation if concerns arise
grades.reason: Clearly explains SAR reporting obligations to NCA and includes DAML process details
